message:
fix(ufunc): propagate NaN in ptp (peak-to-peak) for both UFuncArray and MaskedArray

NumPy's ptp propagates NaN: if any element is NaN, the result is NaN.
Replace f64::min/f64::max in the full-reduction ptp path with explicit
NaN-checking loops that return NaN immediately on encountering a NaN
value. Apply the same fix to MaskedArray::ptp for consistency.

Add tests for NaN propagation in ptp reductions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
